name: Pace Golf Lounge
about: Pace Golf Lounge is a premier indoor golf lounge in Trophy Club, Texas, featuring cutting-edge TrackMan technology. The venue offers year-round golf in a comfortable, climate-controlled space where players can enjoy playing iconic virtual courses and sharpening their skills with precision data. It's designed to be perfect for all skill levels, combining serious golf with a laid-back bar atmosphere, featuring drinks, big screens, and a social environment. The facility provides a premium indoor golf experience where guests can book private bays by the hour for casual rounds, practice sessions, group outings, and special events.
why_golfers_like_it: Industry-leading TrackMan IO technology for precise shot tracking and real-world feedback
Climate-controlled comfort allowing year-round play regardless of weather
Combination of premium golf simulation and a full-service bar with a relaxed social atmosphere
Ability to book private bays by the hour for flexible scheduling
Access to world-famous virtual golf courses with stunning realism

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on the website.
Full bar available with happy hour drink prices on weekdays for members.

simulator_hardware.notes: Cutting-edge dual Doppler radar technology in every bay, trusted by professionals worldwide.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state if club rentals are available. It is recommended to contact them directly to inquire about club rental options.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are permitted, as Pace Golf Lounge features its own full bar with a variety of beverages available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A standard 18-hole round takes about one hour per golfer. When reserving a bay, plan on adding roughly 20 minutes for each additional person (e.g., a group of 4 can finish in about 2 hours).

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Pace Golf Lounge does not market itself as a family-oriented venue and its atmosphere appears geared towards adults, focusing on a premium bar and lounge experience. It is not specifically advertised as kid-friendly.
